      {
        "rank": 1,

        "rpr": "77",

        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",

        "fair_odds": "4.80",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seemed in need of the experience and/or found 1m on the sharp side in sole 2yo start; fared better with third-place finish upped to 1m2f at Bath (good) on reappearance and is bred to do better still, being related to a few winners for his yard; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "It's Debatable",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Sottsass",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "17.5%",
        "fair_odds": "5.72",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "40,000gns yearling; brother to French 1m/1m4f winner Dixmude; dam US 8.5f turf scorer, half-sister to winners Vue Fantastique (1m2f Group 3) and Calling Out (1m 2yo Listed); this debutant represents an in-form stable; interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Al Maslool (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "17",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "537",

        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.28",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Thrice-raced colt who made no impression at Yarmouth (kept to 1m) on turf debut most recently but may be ready for a crack at this longer distance; one of the main contenders on penultimate effort, namely 1l third at Lingfield (AW)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "11.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.67",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "30,000euros yearling, 20,000gns 2yo; by Teofilo and first foal of twice-raced (RPR 62) daughter of Irish 1,000 Guineas winner; one of several newcomers in the field; market instructive."
      },

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "65,000euros yearling; by Sea The Moon; dam unraced sister to 7f/8.6f 2yo winner Pomelo, half-sister to Group 1 scorers Bluestocking (1m2f/1m4f including Arc) and Qirat (1m Sussex Stakes); nicely bred newcomer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.5",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.90",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Belied his 100-1 odds with close third at Kempton (1m, AW) in sole 2yo run; posted a lesser effort when 25-1 at Doncaster (1m2f) on reappearance but may improve with the outing under his belt and this seems a slightly easier race."
      },

      }

  {
    "course": "Beverley",
    "time": "14:22",
    "race_name": "Racing To School Reaches 25 Years Restricted Novice Stakes (Bands B, C & D) (GBB/IRE Incentive Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Beautiful Rainbow",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "17.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.89",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal; 40,000euros yearling; first foal; by Cotai Glory out of 6f 2yo/1m winner (RPR 83) whose winning siblings include Amadeus Wolf (6f 2yo Group 1) and Rouleau (6f 2yo Group 3); bred to go a bit and yard 1-7 with 2yos here in last five years; market check needed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Matteo",
        "jockey": "Kevin Stott",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Coulsty",
        "dam_sire": "Society Rock",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "14.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.10",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; 43,000euros yearling by Coulsty; fourth foal; half-brother to 6f AW winner Alainn Tu (RPR 58); dam 5f 2yo winner (90), half-sister to Listed-placed 7f/1m winner Sensei; yard has already unearthed a good winning 2yo newcomer this year (favourite) and won this with a beginner last April; likely type."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Half A Hoof",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Stravinsky",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.42",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "March foal; 31,000euros yearling; eighth foal; Lucky Vega half-sister to winners including Fullness Of Life (Italian 6f-1m including 2yo/Group 3; RPR 99) and Sopran Brescia (Italian 1m1f-1m3f); dam Italian 6f 2yo winner; yard had few turf runners this year but 3-6 with 2yos here; market helpful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lauralynn",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3",
        "sire": "Inns Of Court",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "48.3",
        "model_pct": "11.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.08",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Suffered a wide passage on C&D debut (good to soft; 40-1) last week where she shaped quite nicely, losing second only late on behind a smart newcomer; should improve but there are dangers among the newcomers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Craven Force",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Craig Lidster",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Beat Hollow",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "45.0",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.41",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; 16,000gns yearling; sixth foal; by Caturra; half-brother to winners Make Us Proud (1m4f/1m7f including AW/Australia; RPR 95) and Sesame Birah (Listed-placed 7f 2yo; 93); dam 1m4f AW winner (79); no surprise if this 5f proves on the sharp side."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Disbelief",
        "jockey": "Mikey Sheehy",
        "trainer": "Adrian Paul Keatley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Mehmas",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",

        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.62",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "January foal; 11,000gns foal, \u00a326,000 yearling; first foal; by Ubettabelieveit out of 7f/1m maiden (RPR 41), half-sister to winners All Star Cast (French Listed-placed 7f 2yo) and Manuha (1m); has been gelded; yard had a shortish-priced beginner run respectably this month; market can guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; second foal; by Ubettabelieveit out of 6f winner (RPR 57), half-sister to several winners including Bahuta Acha (5f/6f including 2yo; RPR 84) and Mininggold (5f/6f including 2yo; 82); yard has low strike-rate in 2yo maiden and novice events in recent years; likely other days."
      },

        "ts": "-",

        "fair_odds": "14.00",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; 7,000euros yearling; sixth foal; by Kuroshio; half-brother to winners Philos (1m4f/1m6f AW; RPR 67) and Cham's Pride (Spanish 9.5f including 2yo); dam French 9.5f turf/10.7f AW winner; looks best watched making debut against 2yos with speedier pedigrees."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "ts": "22",

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "28-1 for her recent debut over C&D when slowly away and finished at the back of the pack; unlikely for now; yard also runs Concert Pitch."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dam had some speedy siblings, including Group 3 winner Strath Burn; 20-1 for debut in the Brocklesby at Doncaster (5f, good to soft) in March where he was very slowly away but showed some minor promise thereafter; this stiffer test may well suit and can expect improvement."
      }

        "fair_odds": "6.26",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three of five wins have come at Haydock but he found an impressive finish when winning over C&D (good) last April on sole course start; on his lowest mark since the summer of 2024 and can go well with tongue-tie refitted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Novello Lad (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Paul Midgley",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "71029-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Kendargent",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "15.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.53",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All best form at 6f on good or quicker ground; easily excused a modest farewell to 2025 on account of soft going but he does have something to prove in his first-ever 5f run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "I'm Next (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "2198-2",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Equiano",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "13.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.25",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has won three of 11 handicaps (heavy/AW/good to soft; acts on good to firm), also runner-up to strong candidates on two occasions, including when losing his lead near the line over C&D last week; solid chance off the same mark; due 1lb rise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Jenever (GB)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Jessica Macey",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "919-05",
        "sire": "Swiss Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.80",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unraced on this course but some of his best form has come over Sandown's similarly stiff 5f and he's back on the same mark as his latest win there last June (good; a race he'd won 12 months earlier); every chance of being seen to good effect back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tees Aggregates",
        "jockey": "Jack Garritty",
        "trainer": "Adrian Nicholls",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "3017-5",
        "sire": "Earthlight",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "49.2",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.98",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can be slowly away but he showed no mercy to his rivals when making all over C&D (good to firm) last August; returned from a long winter break with an unlucky run on Southwell AW 16 days ago and he's one to be interested in back on this track; yard won race in 2022."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Fuji Mountain",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "835-02",

        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 3,

        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.59",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": ""
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Arctic Summer",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "0379-9",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "45.3",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.49",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over 6f in France (very soft) as 2yo; couldn't cope with high marks in Britain last year and made no serious impact on reappearance at Doncaster (6f, good to soft) last month; may need more weight off her back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Until Dawn (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Alan Brown",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "75958-",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Ribchester",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "43.4",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.13",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 5f wins on the AW early in 2025 but she was well below her best on sand in the autumn; has had wind surgery since but the suitability of this track is in doubt now back on turf for the first time in nearly a year."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Beverley",
    "time": "15:22",
    "race_name": "Alan McGuinness And Robin Lunness Memorial Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "trainer": "Ismail Mohammed",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "239-21",

        "dam_sire": "Distorted Humor",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "24.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.09",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has won over middle distances, including on turf, but seems to need shorter nowadays and made all over 1m at Southwell (AW) when last seen; could make a bold bid on this track provided he again goes from the front; stable going very well (3-5 with big LSP) this month; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Milteye",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Harriet Bethell",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "261-01",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "15.1%",
        "fair_odds": "6.64",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Campaigned mostly on good ground or softer; tactically versatile; overcame traffic issues to get up in the final strides in apprentice race at Ripon (1m) last week, taking turf record to 5-20; drawn wide but otherwise has strong claims with penalty avoided; future mark 3lb higher."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Priapos (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Shane Gray",
        "trainer": "Phillip Makin",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "95112-",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Hot Streak",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.50",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Proved suited by the switch to AW towards the end of his 2025 campaign and nearly completed a 1m hat-trick on final outing; chance depends on whether he can keep up the good form returned to turf; only 1-12 in this sphere and 10lb higher than last attempt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Highfield Viking (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "John & Sean Quinn",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "25736-",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.68",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained last year's two wins in August but has recorded his other two successes (2023/2024) in the month of April; drawn against the inner rail and could be a danger, provided he's in top form on seasonal debut; market support would heighten interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Yaajooz (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Chalkley(7)",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "74",

        "dam_sire": "Uncle Mo",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.34",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained sole win in July 2024 on final start for previous yard; record of 0-9 for current stable doesn't tell the whole story as he's posted a few second-place finishes that represent peak form; capable of going well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "91",

        "stall": 6,

        "model_pct": "7.9%",
        "fair_odds": "12.71",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Low-mileage 4yo whose last two efforts, latest on stable/seasonal debut, can be excused; steadily progressive RPRs otherwise and gained sole success over C&D (good to firm); interesting back down in class and returned to this scenario."
      },

  {
    "course": "Beverley",
    "time": "15:52",

    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Iwantmytimewithyou",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "1557-2",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Dalakhani",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "23.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.20",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Low-mileage 4yo who completed a turf double (1m4f/1m6f) last July; creditable second at Kempton (1m4f, AW) on reappearance; has shown all that best form in Class 6 but may do better still this term; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Naval Tribute",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "75617",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "23.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.25",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has worn cheekpieces since switched to handicaps, winning at Kempton (1m3f) then below par at Lingfield, both on AW; may rebound and have more to offer, provided he responds well to the fitting of visor."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Valley Of Flowers (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Samantha & Jacqueline Coward",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "82443-",
        "sire": "Slade Power",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "21.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.70",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended last season with a spell of consistent efforts and has frame possibilities provided she returns in similar form; whether she can end a losing spell is another matter (no win since 2023)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Roland Garros",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Hayley Burton",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "259-51",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Cadeaux Genereux",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.23",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Needed a drop to Class 6 to open his account in Catterick event (1m4f, good) last time; back up in grade but may build on that win and also have more to offer in the retained cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dr Rio",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "6615-5",
        "sire": "Rio De La Plata",
        "dam_sire": "Monsieur Bond",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.88",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran who is 6-23 at Beverley, the most recent success last August in last 1m4f attempt; could go well returned to this scenario with Catterick reappearance (7f) under his belt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Kitsune Power",

        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "3656-3",

        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "48.7",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.15",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Defied a much higher mark at Beverley in 2022; poor strike-rate since but he ran encouragingly when favourite at Catterick (1m4f) on seasonal debut and has possibilities back here, being so nicely weighted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "ts": "77",

        "fair_odds": "20.31",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained most recent win in handicap hurdle in December; beaten only 2l over C&D last week, taking Beverley record to 1423234; hasn't scored on Flat since June 2024 but looks a solid contender kept to this venue."
      }
    ]
  },

        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "19.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.14",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record of 0-8 on turf but he ran well at Yarmouth on penultimate start and readily justified favouritism at Lingfield (1m) on Monday for a third AW win; 5lb penalty is offset by Mason Paetel's useful claim; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "fair_odds": "5.37",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran who gained most recently success in C&D contest (off 5lb higher) last May on second start of his 2025 campaign; reasonably interesting returned to this scenario with Thirsk reappearance under his belt."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Couple of duck eggs this term leave a doubt over her current form; however, gained one of her five wins in 2025 over this C&D and she holds a good chance off current mark provided a resurgence materialises; runner-up in this race 12 months ago."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record is 4-23, the most recent win last September in sole C&D attempt (soft); generally consistent since, respectable fifth at Doncaster (1m2f) most recently; gained other turf success on good ground; solid."

        "edge": "-",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sold for 9,000gns since his sole start (2m) for Micky Hammond; still a maiden and drops back markedly in trip but has possibilities on the pick of his form for William Knight; wears new headgear on debut for Ed Bethell; market may offer further guidance."
      },

        "spotlight": "Took AW score to 0-16 with two below-par efforts on AW for new stable during the winter; record over C&D, all off higher marks in Class 5, reads 112; interesting back in this scenario and in this lower grade, with a return to form on the cards."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "cd": "",

        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built on his debut effort when ending up a comfortable winner at Redcar (7f, good to soft) in September; took another step forward when winning a novice under a penalty at Newmarket (7f, good) in October when last seen, form that has been franked with six of those behind winning since; had wind surgery since; stepping up in trip should prove no issue and he looks the one to beat on his return."
      },

        "cd": "",

      }
    ]

      }
    ]

  {

        "spotlight": "Two-time course winner in a good vein of form; landed 6f handicap here in January; too free when seventh over 7f after; back to winning ways over 6f 22 days ago, beating Bullet Bourbon by 1.75l, travelling powerfully; drop to 5f shouldn't be a problem; leading player off 7lb higher albeit drawn wide."
      },

        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 5f Cork maiden on debut in April 2025, form of which nothing special; returned from nearly a year off the track 41 days ago, ran ok to be beaten 9.5l into fourth by Flanker Jet; will improve for that and opening mark looks quite fair."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bounced back to form of her maiden runs when 1.75l second to Stone Bear here over 6f in January; followed that up 15 days later with a third over the same C&D; 13lb better off with Stone Bear than when they last met; likes to be ridden forcefully and dangerous back in trip for trainer in flying form."
      },

        "fair_odds": "8.44",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fair form in trio of maidens, latest when beaten 3.25l into fifth by Oxford Circus 55 days ago; travelled nicely that day so drop back to 5f looks a good move; opening mark doesn't look harsh; definite chance in first-time tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved to spring 33-1 surprise when beating Jazzy Dancer by 0.5l over 6f here last month; ran fine when beaten 4.5l into eighth off 4lb higher 22 days ago; drops in trip and has a squeak under good claimer."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the sixth attempt when beating two rivals in good style in a maiden at Lingfield (1m4f, AW) in November but he dropped away up the straight having taken a grip in a handicap at Kempton on his return 17 days ago; needs to build on that."
      },

        "score": "58.5",

        "fair_odds": "4.17",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his last two starts for Ralph Beckett and completed the hat-trick here over 2m in November when visored for the first time on his debut for this stable; ran another good race when runner-up at Kempton (2m) next time but he was below his best 97 days ago; could bounce back on his first start since but this drop back in trip may not be ideal."

      }

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner in September from 7lb lower; got going too late when beaten favourite at Cork end of last term; slowly away and eased once chance was gone on return at Gowran a fortnight ago; should be sharper now."

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second runner for yard; cheap purchase out of Ed Bethell's yard; has found his level since coming down from a peak Irish rating of 56; runner-up over 7f here in January before hitting the frame twice over C&D; faded late after forceful ride from wide draw on latest; player from inside draw."

        "spotlight": "Gained just second win from 39 starts when springing 50-1 shock in 7f course claimer in December; creditable efforts in two handicaps here since for new yard; below best on softish ground at Leopardstown eight days ago but player back on this surface."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising debut when 3.5l fourth here over 1m 48 days ago behind Son Of Beauty, despite being unconsidered in market; not given a hard time and will improve; steps up in trip and should be thereabouts."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel colt, brother to yard's top-class Irish 1,000 Guineas winner Lake Victoria; very green on debut at Leopardstown in October when fifth; small step forward when 12l sixth to James J Braddock on heavy 172 days ago, still green; steps up in trip in first-time cheekpieces; another step forward likely and obvious claims."

        "edge": "-",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed ability when eighth on racecourse debut at Cork in September; matched that form when beaten 15.5l behind potentially smart rival 187 days ago; form of that maiden looks strong; can figure if handling step up in trip."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eight wins on the AW include three at this track (6f/7f), the last win coming off 2lb lower at Wolverhampton last month; ran well when runner-up here 16 days ago and there's no reason why he can't go well again."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won her first two starts in 7f novice events on the AW but she's mostly struggled since, including when beating only one home at Lingfield (7f, AW) 20 days ago; drops in grade with her mark continuing to fall."
